topics.label: Setup (sbt + Chisel)
topics.description: Install sbt and add Chisel dependency. Chisel generates Verilog from Scala.

topics.label: Modules & IO
topics.description: Module class with IO bundle. Define inputs/outputs with Input/Output.

topics.label: Types (UInt, SInt, Bool)
topics.description: Hardware types with width. UInt(8.W) is an 8-bit unsigned integer.

topics.label: Combinational Logic
topics.description: Wire, :=, Mux, switch/is. Describe combinational circuits.

topics.label: Sequential Logic
topics.description: RegInit, RegNext for flip-flops. withClockAndReset for clock domains.

topics.label: Parameterization
topics.description: Use Scala generics and parameters for configurable hardware generators.

topics.label: Testing (ChiselTest)
topics.description: Write testbenches in Scala with poke, expect, step.
